sentences.target: Ich mag die neue Technologie im Bus.
sentences.reading: /ɪç maːk diː ˈnɔʏ̯ə tɛçnoloˈgiː ɪm bʊs/

translations.de: Ich mag die neue Technologie im Bus.
translations.ipa: /ɪç maːk diː ˈnɔʏ̯ə tɛçnoloˈgiː ɪm bʊs/
translations.en: I like the new technology on the bus.
translations.es: Me gusta la nueva tecnología en el autobús.
translations.fr: J'aime la nouvelle technologie dans le bus.
translations.it: Mi piace la nuova tecnologia sull'autobus.
translations.ko: 버스에 도입된 새로운 기술이 마음에 들어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我喜欢公交车上的新技术。
translations.yue: 我鍾意巴士上面嘅新科技。
translations.ru: Мне нравится новая технология в автобусе.
translations.pt: Gosto da nova tecnologia no ônibus.
translations.he: אני אוהב את הטכנולוגיה החדשה באוטובוס.
translations.vi: Tôi thích công nghệ mới trên xe buýt.
translations.nl: Ik vind de nieuwe technologie in de bus leuk.
translations.uk: Мені подобається нова технологія в автобусі.
translations.hu: Tetszik az új technológia a buszon.
translations.hi: मुझे बस में नई तकनीक पसंद है.
translations.pl: Podoba mi się nowa technologia w autobusie.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει η νέα τεχνολογία στο λεωφορείο.
translations.nb: Jeg liker den nye teknologien på bussen.
translations.id: Saya suka teknologi baru di bus.
translations.sv: Jag gillar den nya tekniken på bussen.
translations.ro: Îmi place tehnologia nouă din autobuz.
translations.cs: Líbí se mi nová technologie v autobuse.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide den nye teknologi i bussen.
translations.ja: バスの新しい技術が気に入っています。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular personal pronoun in nominative case; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects an accusative object.
Definite article, accusative singular feminine; determiner of 'Technologie' (direct object).
Attributive adjective, accusative singular feminine with weak inflection after definite article; modifies 'Technologie'.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; direct object of 'mag'.
Contraction of preposition 'in' + definite article 'dem'; governs dative and introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun, masculine, dative singular as object of the preposition 'im'; head of the PP indicating location.

sentences.target: Diese Technologie macht meinen Alltag viel leichter.
sentences.reading: /ˈdiːzə tɛçnoloˈgiː maxt ˈmaɪ̯nən ˈʔaltaːk fiːl ˈlaɪ̯çtɐ/

translations.de: Diese Technologie macht meinen Alltag viel leichter.
translations.ipa: /ˈdiːzə tɛçnoloˈgiː maxt ˈmaɪ̯nən ˈʔaltaːk fiːl ˈlaɪ̯çtɐ/
translations.en: This technology makes my everyday life much easier.
translations.es: Esta tecnología me facilita mucho la vida diaria.
translations.fr: Cette technologie me facilite beaucoup la vie au quotidien.
translations.it: Questa tecnologia mi rende la vita di tutti i giorni molto più facile.
translations.ko: 이 기술 덕분에 일상이 한결 편해졌어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这项技术让我的日常生活轻松了很多。
translations.yue: 呢種科技令我嘅日常生活方便咗好多。
translations.ru: Эта технология сильно упрощает мою повседневную жизнь.
translations.pt: Essa tecnologia deixa meu dia a dia muito mais fácil.
translations.he: הטכנולוגיה הזאת מקלה מאוד על חיי היומיום שלי.
translations.tr: Bu teknoloji günlük hayatımı çok kolaylaştırıyor.
translations.vi: Công nghệ này giúp cuộc sống hằng ngày của tôi dễ dàng hơn nhiều.
translations.ar: هذه التكنولوجيا تسهّل حياتي اليومية كثيرًا.
translations.nl: Deze technologie maakt mijn dagelijks leven veel makkelijker.
translations.uk: Ця технологія значно полегшує моє повсякденне життя.
translations.hu: Ez a technológia sokkal megkönnyíti a mindennapjaimat.
translations.hi: यह तकनीक मेरी रोज़मर्रा की ज़िंदगी को बहुत आसान बना देती है.
translations.pl: Ta technologia bardzo ułatwia mi codzienne życie.
translations.el: Αυτή η τεχνολογία κάνει την καθημερινή μου ζωή πολύ πιο εύκολη.
translations.nb: Denne teknologien gjør hverdagen min mye enklere.
translations.id: Teknologi ini membuat keseharian saya jauh lebih mudah.
translations.sv: Den här tekniken gör min vardag mycket enklare.
translations.ro: Această tehnologie îmi face viața de zi cu zi mult mai ușoară.
translations.cs: Tato technologie mi výrazně usnadňuje každodenní život.
translations.da: Denne teknologi gør min hverdag meget lettere.
translations.ja: この技術のおかげで日常生活がずっと楽になりました。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, nominative singular feminine; modifies 'Technologie' (subject).
Common noun, feminine, nominative singular; subject of 'macht'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes an object plus a predicative complement.
Possessive determiner, accusative singular masculine; modifies 'Alltag' (direct object).
Common noun, masculine, accusative singular; direct object affected by 'macht'.
Degree adverb intensifying the comparative adjective 'leichter' (viel + comparative = 'much easier').
Predicative adjective in comparative form; resultative/object complement describing the new state of 'Alltag'.

sentences.target: Unsere Schule investiert in moderne Technologie.

translations.de: Unsere Schule investiert in moderne Technologie.
translations.en: Our school invests in modern technology.
translations.es: Nuestra escuela invierte en tecnología moderna.
translations.fr: Notre école investit dans des technologies modernes.
translations.it: La nostra scuola investe nella tecnologia moderna.
translations.ko: 우리 학교는 최신 기술에 투자하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们学校正在投资现代技术。
translations.yue: 我哋學校投資現代科技。
translations.ru: Наша школа инвестирует в современные технологии.
translations.pt: Nossa escola investe em tecnologia moderna.
translations.he: בית הספר שלנו משקיע בטכנולוגיה מודרנית.
translations.vi: Trường chúng tôi đầu tư vào công nghệ hiện đại.
translations.nl: Onze school investeert in moderne technologie.
translations.uk: Наша школа інвестує в сучасні технології.
translations.hi: हमारा स्कूल आधुनिक तकनीक में निवेश कर रहा है.
translations.pl: Nasza szkoła inwestuje w nowoczesne technologie.
translations.el: Το σχολείο μας επενδύει σε σύγχρονη τεχνολογία.
translations.nb: Skolen vår investerer i moderne teknologi.
translations.id: Sekolah kami berinvestasi dalam teknologi modern.
translations.sv: Vår skola investerar i modern teknik.
translations.ro: Școala noastră investește în tehnologie modernă.
translations.cs: Naše škola investuje do moderních technologií.
translations.da: Vores skole investerer i moderne teknologi.
translations.ja: 私たちの学校は最新の技術に投資しています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative singular feminine; modifies 'Schule' (subject).
Common noun, feminine, nominative singular; subject of 'investiert'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Preposition selecting accusative here (governed by the verb 'investieren in' = to invest in); introduces a prepositional object.
Attributive adjective, accusative singular feminine with strong inflection (no article present); modifies 'Technologie'.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'in' (prepositional object).

sentences.target: Die Technologie nervt mich schon wieder.

translations.de: Die Technologie nervt mich schon wieder.
translations.en: The technology is annoying me again.
translations.es: La tecnología me está molestando otra vez.
translations.it: La tecnologia mi dà di nuovo fastidio.
translations.pt: A tecnologia está me irritando de novo.
translations.vi: Công nghệ lại làm tôi bực mình.
translations.hi: तकनीक फिर से मुझे परेशान कर रही है.
translations.id: Teknologi ini membuat saya kesal lagi.
translations.ja: また機械にイライラしている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular feminine; determiner of 'Technologie' (subject).
Common noun, feminine, nominative singular; subject of 'nervt'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
1st-person singular personal pronoun in accusative case; direct object of 'nervt'.
Adverb/particle indicating 'already'; here part of the idiomatic collocation 'schon wieder' ('yet again') modifying the clause.
Adverb meaning 'again'; with 'schon' forms 'schon wieder' emphasizing repeated occurrence.

Diese Technologie macht meinen Alltag viel leichter.
Unsere Schule investiert in moderne Technologie.
Die Technologie nervt mich schon wieder.

/ˈdiːzə tɛçnoloˈgiː maxt ˈmaɪ̯nən ˈʔaltaːk fiːl ˈlaɪ̯çtɐ/
de: Ich mag die neue Technologie im Bus.
Diese Technologie macht meinen Alltag viel leichter.
Unsere Schule investiert in moderne Technologie.

en: I like the new technology on the bus.
This technology makes my everyday life much easier.
Our school invests in modern technology.
The technology is annoying me again.

es: Me gusta la nueva tecnología en el autobús.
Esta tecnología me facilita mucho la vida diaria.
Nuestra escuela invierte en tecnología moderna.
La tecnología me está molestando otra vez.
fr: J'aime la nouvelle technologie dans le bus.
Cette technologie me facilite beaucoup la vie au quotidien.
Notre école investit dans des technologies modernes.
it: Mi piace la nuova tecnologia sull'autobus.
Questa tecnologia mi rende la vita di tutti i giorni molto più facile.
La nostra scuola investe nella tecnologia moderna.
La tecnologia mi dà di nuovo fastidio.

우리 학교는 최신 기술에 투자하고 있어요.

Наша школа инвестирует в современные технологии.

Essa tecnologia deixa meu dia a dia muito mais fácil.
Nossa escola investe em tecnologia moderna.

Deze technologie maakt mijn dagelijks leven veel makkelijker.
Onze school investeert in moderne technologie.

Ця технологія значно полегшує моє повсякденне життя.
Наша школа інвестує в сучасні технології.

Ez a technológia sokkal megkönnyíti a mindennapjaimat.
